name: prometheus-site
description: Performance-forward monorepo for Qwik frontend and Bun Elysia API services.

scripts.build:site: bun run build:fragment-css && bun run --cwd apps/site build
scripts.build:web: bun run build:fragment-css && bun run --cwd apps/site build
scripts.build: bun run build:site && bun run build:api
scripts.build:tauri:android: bun run --cwd apps/tauri tauri android build
scripts.build:tauri:ios: bun run --cwd apps/tauri tauri ios build
scripts.tauri:keys:generate: bun run --cwd apps/tauri tauri signer generate --output src-tauri/updater
scripts.tauri:mobile:init: bun run --cwd apps/tauri tauri android init && bun run --cwd apps/tauri tauri ios init
scripts.tauri:icons:generate: bun run --cwd apps/tauri tauri icon apps/site/public/icons/icon-512.png
scripts.tauri:release:desktop: PROMETHEUS_TAURI_PROFILE=prod VITE_TAURI=1 bun run --cwd apps/tauri tauri build
scripts.tauri:release:mobile: PROMETHEUS_TAURI_PROFILE=prod VITE_TAURI=1 bun run --cwd apps/tauri tauri android build && PROMETHEUS_TAURI_PROFILE=prod VITE_TAURI=1 bun run --cwd apps/tauri tauri ios build
scripts.preview: bun run build:fragment-css && VITE_TAURI=1 PROMETHEUS_DEVICE_HOST=0 bun run scripts/preview.ts
scripts.lint: bun run lint:workspace && bun run lint:api && bun run lint:web
scripts.typecheck: bun run build:fragment-css && bunx --bun tsc -p packages/platform/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx --bun tsc -p apps/site/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx --bun tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx --bun tsc -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx --bun tsc -p packages/features/auth/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx --bun tsc -p packages/features/store/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx --bun tsc -p packages/features/messaging/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx --bun tsc -p packages/features/lab/tsconfig.json --noEmit
